## Linked issues

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] 📚 Docs only
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore / CI (no user-visible behavior change)

## How was this tested?

<!--
Describe the tests added or run. Include commands, before/after screenshots,
or short clips for UI changes.
-->

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] Manually verified on: <!-- e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I've added tests for new behavior (or explained why not)
- [ ] I've updated docs (README / ROADMAP / ARCHITECTURE) when relevant
- [ ] No new `clippy` or `eslint` warnings introduced
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or credentials are included
